headline: Jim Cramer Says “D-Wave Is the One That I Identified as Being the Best” For Quantum
summary: D-Wave Quantum Inc. (NYSE:QBTS) is one of the stocks Jim Cramer shared his thoughts on as he discussed Big Tech’s AI spending. headline: Jim Cramer Says “I Want You to Buy IBM”
summary: International Business Machines Corporation (NYSE:IBM) was one of the stocks featured in Jim Cramer’s Mad Money recap, as he discussed how the AI build-out could power the economy. During the episode, a caller asked if the stock is a buy, sell, or hold. Cramer replied: I want you to buy IBM. I do not understand […]

headline: How Are the AI-Immune HALO Stocks Doing in 2026?
summary: Heavy asset, low obsolescence stocks have generally done well in 2026.

headline: Does IBM’s Think 2026 AI And Sovereign Cloud Push Change The Bull Case For IBM (IBM)?
summary: At its Think 2026 conference in early May, IBM unveiled a broad suite of new enterprise AI, hybrid cloud, and sovereignty products, including upgrades to watsonx Orchestrate, the IBM Concert operations platform, and the now generally available IBM Sovereign Core. Together with fresh alliances spanning Aramco, LogicMonitor, MIT, and others, these launches highlight IBM’s push to make agentic AI, real-time data, and quantum-centric computing practical for large organizations with strict...
